id.title: id
id.description: Server-assigned unique ID of the Settings record.

namespaceId.title: namespace_id
namespaceId.description: ID of the namespace the Settings record belongs to.

clusterId.title: cluster_id
clusterId.description: ID of the cluster the Settings record applies to.

originatorId.title: originator_id
originatorId.description: ID of the upstream object the record originated from, when imported.

name.title: name
name.description: Human-readable name of the Settings record.

installationId.title: installation_id
installationId.description:
Stable identifier for this installation, used in telemetry and
 diagnostics. Generated at first start when unset.

logLevel.title: log_level
logLevel.description:
Global log level for Pomerium services ("debug", "info", "warn",
 "error"). Empty falls back to "info".

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

oneOf.title: StringList
oneOf.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

accessLogFields.title: access_log_fields

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

oneOf.title: StringList
oneOf.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

authorizeLogFields.title: authorize_log_fields
authorizeLogFields.description: Subset of authorize-log fields to emit; see ListAvailableLogFields.

proxyLogLevel.title: proxy_log_level
proxyLogLevel.description: Log level for the proxy service in particular, overriding `log_level`.

sharedSecret.title: shared_secret
sharedSecret.description:
Cluster-wide shared secret used to sign and validate internal requests
 and JWTs across Pomerium services. Must be a base64-encoded 32-byte
 value.

services.title: services
services.description:
Comma-separated list of Pomerium services to run in this process
 ("all", "authenticate", "authorize", "databroker", "proxy").

address.title: address
address.description: IP address and port for serving HTTPS requests (e.g. ":443").

insecureServer.title: insecure_server
insecureServer.description:
When true, Pomerium serves HTTP without TLS. Intended only for testing
 behind a TLS-terminating load balancer.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

dnsFailureRefreshRate.title: dns_failure_refresh_rate
dnsFailureRefreshRate.description: How long Envoy waits before retrying a failed DNS resolution.

dnsLookupFamily.title: dns_lookup_family
dnsLookupFamily.description:
Envoy DNS lookup family ("AUTO", "V4_ONLY", "V6_ONLY", "V4_PREFERRED",
 "ALL"). Controls which address families Envoy resolves.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

dnsQueryTimeout.title: dns_query_timeout
dnsQueryTimeout.description: Maximum time Envoy waits for a single DNS query to return.

dnsQueryTries.title: dns_query_tries
dnsQueryTries.description: Number of times Envoy retries a failed DNS query before giving up.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

dnsRefreshRate.title: dns_refresh_rate
dnsRefreshRate.description: How often Envoy refreshes resolved addresses regardless of TTL.

dnsUdpMaxQueries.title: dns_udp_max_queries
dnsUdpMaxQueries.description:
Maximum number of in-flight DNS queries Envoy will multiplex over a
 single UDP socket.

dnsUseTcp.title: dns_use_tcp
dnsUseTcp.description: When true, Envoy resolves DNS over TCP instead of UDP.

id.title: id
id.description:
Optional identifier for the certificate, used to refer to it from
 other parts of the configuration.

items.title: Certificate
items.description:
An inline TLS certificate/key pair Pomerium serves for matching SNI
 hostnames.

certificates.title: certificates
certificates.description:
Inline TLS certificate/key pairs Pomerium serves. Each entry is matched
 against the request's SNI hostname.

certificateKeyPairIds.title: certificate_key_pair_ids
certificateKeyPairIds.description:
IDs of managed key pairs to serve as TLS certificates, as an alternative
 to inline `certificates` entries.

httpRedirectAddr.title: http_redirect_addr
httpRedirectAddr.description:
Address (host:port) on which Pomerium listens for plaintext HTTP and
 issues a redirect to the HTTPS address. Empty disables the redirect
 listener.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

timeoutRead.title: timeout_read
timeoutRead.description:
Maximum time the proxy will wait for a complete request from a
 downstream client.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

timeoutWrite.title: timeout_write
timeoutWrite.description:
Maximum time the proxy will wait to send a complete response to a
 downstream client.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

timeoutIdle.title: timeout_idle
timeoutIdle.description: Maximum idle time on a kept-alive connection before it is closed.

authenticateServiceUrl.title: authenticate_service_url
authenticateServiceUrl.description: Externally accessible URL for the authenticate service.

authenticateInternalServiceUrl.title: authenticate_internal_service_url
authenticateInternalServiceUrl.description:
URL Pomerium uses internally to reach the authenticate service. Set
 when the externally visible URL goes through a load balancer that
 proxies cannot reuse.

signoutRedirectUrl.title: signout_redirect_url
signoutRedirectUrl.description: URL to redirect users to after they sign out.

cookieName.title: cookie_name
cookieName.description: Name of the session cookie Pomerium issues. Defaults to "_pomerium".

cookieSecret.title: cookie_secret
cookieSecret.description:
Secret used to encrypt and sign session cookies. Must be a
 base64-encoded 32-byte value.

cookieDomain.title: cookie_domain
cookieDomain.description:
Domain set on the session cookie. Pomerium defaults to the
 authenticate service URL host.

cookieHttpOnly.title: cookie_http_only
cookieHttpOnly.description: When true the session cookie carries the HttpOnly attribute.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

cookieExpire.title: cookie_expire
cookieExpire.description: How long an issued session cookie remains valid.

cookieSameSite.title: cookie_same_site
cookieSameSite.description: SameSite attribute of the session cookie ("strict", "lax", "none").

idpClientId.title: idp_client_id
idpClientId.description: OAuth2 client ID for the identity provider.

idpClientSecret.title: idp_client_secret
idpClientSecret.description: OAuth2 client secret for the identity provider.

idpProvider.title: idp_provider
idpProvider.description:
Identity provider name ("oidc", "okta", "auth0", "google", "azure", …).
 Selects which IdP integration Pomerium uses.

idpProviderUrl.title: idp_provider_url
idpProviderUrl.description: OIDC issuer URL of the identity provider.

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

oneOf.title: StringList
oneOf.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

idpAccessTokenAllowedAudiences.title: idp_access_token_allowed_audiences
idpAccessTokenAllowedAudiences.description:
Audiences Pomerium accepts on IdP-issued access tokens. Required when
 BEARER_TOKEN_FORMAT_IDP_ACCESS_TOKEN routes exist.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description: OIDC scopes Pomerium requests when authenticating users.

requestParams.title: request_params
requestParams.description:
Additional query parameters Pomerium appends to the IdP authorization
 request.

authorizeServiceUrls.title: authorize_service_urls
authorizeServiceUrls.description: Externally accessible URLs for the authorize service.

authorizeInternalServiceUrl.title: authorize_internal_service_url
authorizeInternalServiceUrl.description: URL Pomerium uses internally to reach the authorize service.

overrideCertificateName.title: override_certificate_name
overrideCertificateName.description:
Hostname Pomerium expects in upstream TLS certificates. Useful when
 upstream addresses are IPs but the certificate contains a hostname SAN.

certificateAuthority.title: certificate_authority
certificateAuthority.description:
PEM-encoded certificate authority bundle Pomerium trusts for upstream
 TLS verification.

certificateAuthorityKeyPairId.title: certificate_authority_key_pair_id
certificateAuthorityKeyPairId.description:
ID of a managed key pair whose certificate is used as the upstream CA
 bundle, as an alternative to the inline `certificate_authority` value.

deriveTls.title: derive_tls
deriveTls.description:
Base hostname Pomerium uses to derive default TLS certificates for
 routes. Empty disables derivation.

signingKey.title: signing_key
signingKey.description:
Private key Pomerium uses to sign internally issued JWTs (e.g. the JWT
 attached to upstream requests). Must be a PEM-encoded key.

setResponseHeaders.title: set_response_headers
setResponseHeaders.description: Headers Pomerium sets on every response across all routes.

jwtClaimsHeaders.title: jwt_claims_headers
jwtClaimsHeaders.description:
Map of header name to JWT claim. Pomerium copies the claim value from
 the session JWT to the named header on upstream requests.

oneOf.title: IssuerFormat
oneOf.description:
Format used for the `iss` claim of JWTs Pomerium issues for upstream
 requests.

jwtIssuerFormat.title: jwt_issuer_format
jwtIssuerFormat.description:
Format of the `iss` claim in JWTs Pomerium issues for upstream
 requests.

jwtGroupsFilter.title: jwt_groups_filter
jwtGroupsFilter.description:
Allowlist of group IDs/names; the JWT Pomerium issues includes only
 groups appearing here. Empty means include all.

jwtGroupsFilterInferFromPpl.title: jwt_groups_filter_infer_from_ppl
jwtGroupsFilterInferFromPpl.description:
When true the effective `jwt_groups_filter` is augmented with groups
 referenced by route PPL policies.

oneOf.title: BearerTokenFormat
oneOf.description: Controls how HTTP bearer token authentication is handled.

bearerTokenFormat.title: bearer_token_format
bearerTokenFormat.description:
Cluster-wide default for how to interpret HTTP bearer tokens. Routes
 may override per-route.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

defaultUpstreamTimeout.title: default_upstream_timeout
defaultUpstreamTimeout.description:
Default per-request timeout applied to upstream HTTP requests when a
 route does not specify its own.

debugAddress.title: debug_address
debugAddress.description:
Address (host:port) on which Pomerium exposes its pprof debug
 endpoints. Empty disables them.

metricsAddress.title: metrics_address
metricsAddress.description: Address (host:port) on which Pomerium serves Prometheus metrics.

metricsBasicAuth.title: metrics_basic_auth
metricsBasicAuth.description:
HTTP Basic Auth credentials required to access `metrics_address`, of
 the form "user:password". Empty disables auth.

id.title: id
id.description:
Optional identifier for the certificate, used to refer to it from
 other parts of the configuration.

oneOf.title: Certificate
oneOf.description:
An inline TLS certificate/key pair Pomerium serves for matching SNI
 hostnames.

metricsCertificate.title: metrics_certificate
metricsCertificate.description: TLS certificate/key pair Pomerium uses on the metrics listener.

metricsClientCa.title: metrics_client_ca
metricsClientCa.description:
PEM-encoded CA bundle used to authenticate clients connecting to the
 metrics listener.

metricsClientCaKeyPairId.title: metrics_client_ca_key_pair_id
metricsClientCaKeyPairId.description:
ID of a managed key pair whose certificate is used as the metrics
 client CA bundle, as an alternative to `metrics_client_ca`.

otelTracesExporter.title: otel_traces_exporter
otelTracesExporter.description:
Which OpenTelemetry traces exporter to use ("otlp", "none", …). Empty
 disables tracing.

otelTracesSamplerArg.title: otel_traces_sampler_arg
otelTracesSamplerArg.description:
OpenTelemetry sampler argument. For ratio-based samplers this is the
 sampling probability (0.0–1.0).

otelResourceAttributes.title: otel_resource_attributes
otelResourceAttributes.description:
OpenTelemetry resource attributes appended to every emitted span/log,
 as "key=value" strings.

otelLogLevel.title: otel_log_level
otelLogLevel.description: Log level for the OpenTelemetry SDK itself.

otelAttributeValueLengthLimit.title: otel_attribute_value_length_limit
otelAttributeValueLengthLimit.description:
Maximum length of a single OpenTelemetry attribute value before it is
 truncated.

otelExporterOtlpEndpoint.title: otel_exporter_otlp_endpoint
otelExporterOtlpEndpoint.description:
Default OTLP endpoint Pomerium dials for any OTLP exporter (traces,
 logs) when no signal-specific endpoint is set.

otelExporterOtlpTracesEndpoint.title: otel_exporter_otlp_traces_endpoint
otelExporterOtlpTracesEndpoint.description:
OTLP endpoint specifically for traces; overrides
 `otel_exporter_otlp_endpoint` for the trace signal.

otelExporterOtlpTracesProtocol.title: otel_exporter_otlp_traces_protocol
otelExporterOtlpTracesProtocol.description: OTLP transport protocol used specifically for traces.

otelExporterOtlpHeaders.title: otel_exporter_otlp_headers
otelExporterOtlpHeaders.description:
Headers attached to every OTLP request, as "key=value" strings (e.g.
 for tenant identification).

otelExporterOtlpTracesHeaders.title: otel_exporter_otlp_traces_headers
otelExporterOtlpTracesHeaders.description: OTLP headers used specifically for traces.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

otelExporterOtlpTimeout.title: otel_exporter_otlp_timeout
otelExporterOtlpTimeout.description: Per-request timeout for the OTLP exporter.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

otelExporterOtlpTracesTimeout.title: otel_exporter_otlp_traces_timeout
otelExporterOtlpTracesTimeout.description: Per-request timeout used specifically for the OTLP traces exporter.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

otelBspScheduleDelay.title: otel_bsp_schedule_delay
otelBspScheduleDelay.description:
Delay between scheduled batches of spans the BatchSpanProcessor
 exports.

otelBspMaxExportBatchSize.title: otel_bsp_max_export_batch_size
otelBspMaxExportBatchSize.description: Maximum number of spans per export batch.

grpcAddress.title: grpc_address
grpcAddress.description: Address (host:port) on which Pomerium serves its gRPC API.

grpcInsecure.title: grpc_insecure
grpcInsecure.description:
When true, Pomerium speaks plaintext gRPC instead of TLS. Intended for
 co-located service deployments behind a trusted network boundary.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

grpcClientTimeout.title: grpc_client_timeout
grpcClientTimeout.description:
Per-request timeout applied to gRPC client calls Pomerium makes to its
 own services (authorize, databroker).

databrokerClusterLeaderId.title: databroker_cluster_leader_id
databrokerClusterLeaderId.description: Node ID of the databroker Raft leader, as observed by this process.

databrokerClusterNodeId.title: databroker_cluster_node_id
databrokerClusterNodeId.description:
Node ID this process uses when participating in the databroker
 cluster.

id.title: id
id.description: Stable identifier of the node within the cluster.

grpcAddress.title: grpc_address
grpcAddress.description:
gRPC service address (host:port) other components dial to reach this
 databroker node.

raftAddress.title: raft_address
raftAddress.description: Raft transport address (host:port) used for peer-to-peer replication.

items.title: DataBrokerClusterNode
items.description: One peer in a Pomerium databroker Raft cluster.

nodes.title: nodes
nodes.description: Every node participating in the databroker cluster.

oneOf.title: DataBrokerClusterNodes
oneOf.description: Aggregate list of databroker cluster peers.

databrokerClusterNodes.title: databroker_cluster_nodes
databrokerClusterNodes.description: Full membership list of the databroker cluster.

databrokerServiceUrls.title: databroker_service_urls
databrokerServiceUrls.description: Externally accessible URLs for the databroker service.

databrokerInternalServiceUrl.title: databroker_internal_service_url
databrokerInternalServiceUrl.description: URL Pomerium uses internally to reach the databroker service.

databrokerRaftBindAddress.title: databroker_raft_bind_address
databrokerRaftBindAddress.description: Bind address (host:port) for this node's Raft transport.

databrokerStorageConnectionString.title: databroker_storage_connection_string
databrokerStorageConnectionString.description: Connection string for the databroker storage backend, when applicable.

ca.title: ca
ca.description:
PEM-encoded certificate authority bundle used to verify client
 certificates.

crl.title: crl
crl.description:
PEM-encoded certificate revocation list checked against client
 certificates.

oneOf.title: MtlsEnforcementMode
oneOf.description: Represents a client certificate enforcement behavior.

enforcement.title: enforcement
enforcement.description: How aggressively client certificate requirements are enforced.

sanType.title: san_type
sanType.description: Which SAN entry type this pattern applies to.

pattern.title: pattern
pattern.description: Regular expression the SAN value must fully match.

items.title: SANMatcher
items.description:
SANMatcher describes a constraint against one Subject Alternative Name
 entry in a client certificate.

matchSubjectAltNames.title: match_subject_alt_names
matchSubjectAltNames.description:
Patterns the certificate Subject Alternative Names must satisfy for the
 connection to be allowed.

maxVerifyDepth.title: max_verify_depth
maxVerifyDepth.description:
Maximum depth of the verification chain accepted from clients. Zero
 means use Envoy's default.

caKeyPairId.title: ca_key_pair_id
caKeyPairId.description:
ID of a managed key pair whose certificate is used as the client CA,
 as an alternative to the inline `ca` value.

oneOf.title: DownstreamMtlsSettings
oneOf.description:
DownstreamMtlsSettings controls how Pomerium validates client certificates
 presented by downstream (end-user) connections.

googleCloudServerlessAuthenticationServi.title: google_cloud_serverless_authentication_service_account
googleCloudServerlessAuthenticationServi.description:
Google Cloud service account email Pomerium uses to obtain ID tokens
 for Cloud Run / serverless upstream targets.

useProxyProtocol.title: use_proxy_protocol
useProxyProtocol.description:
When true, Pomerium expects downstream connections to begin with the
 HAProxy PROXY protocol header (v1 or v2).

autocert.title: autocert
autocert.description:
When true, Pomerium uses ACME to automatically obtain and renew TLS
 certificates for the configured route hostnames.

autocertCa.title: autocert_ca
autocertCa.description: Directory URL of the ACME CA to use when `autocert` is enabled.

autocertCaKeyPairId.title: autocert_ca_key_pair_id
autocertCaKeyPairId.description:
ID of a managed key pair whose certificate Pomerium presents to the
 ACME CA for account binding.

autocertEmail.title: autocert_email
autocertEmail.description:
Email address Pomerium registers with the ACME CA. Required by most
 CAs for expiration notifications.

autocertUseStaging.title: autocert_use_staging
autocertUseStaging.description:
When true, Pomerium uses Let's Encrypt's staging environment. Useful
 for testing to avoid hitting rate limits.

autocertEabKeyId.title: autocert_eab_key_id
autocertEabKeyId.description: External Account Binding key identifier provided by the ACME CA.

autocertEabMacKey.title: autocert_eab_mac_key
autocertEabMacKey.description: Base64-URL-encoded EAB MAC key paired with `autocert_eab_key_id`.

autocertMustStaple.title: autocert_must_staple
autocertMustStaple.description:
When true, Pomerium requests certificates with the OCSP Must-Staple
 extension.

autocertDir.title: autocert_dir
autocertDir.description:
Filesystem directory Pomerium uses to cache obtained certificates and
 ACME account state.

autocertTrustedCa.title: autocert_trusted_ca
autocertTrustedCa.description:
PEM-encoded CA bundle Pomerium trusts when validating the ACME CA's
 own TLS certificate, for private ACME servers.

autocertTrustedCaKeyPairId.title: autocert_trusted_ca_key_pair_id
autocertTrustedCaKeyPairId.description:
ID of a managed key pair whose certificate is used as the trusted CA
 for the ACME server, as an alternative to `autocert_trusted_ca`.

skipXffAppend.title: skip_xff_append
skipXffAppend.description:
When true, Pomerium does not append the immediate client IP to the
 X-Forwarded-For header on upstream requests.

xffNumTrustedHops.title: xff_num_trusted_hops
xffNumTrustedHops.description:
Number of trusted hops Pomerium considers when extracting the
 client IP from the X-Forwarded-For header.

envoyAdminAccessLogPath.title: envoy_admin_access_log_path
envoyAdminAccessLogPath.description:
Path to which Envoy writes admin-interface access logs. Empty
 disables admin-access logging.

envoyAdminProfilePath.title: envoy_admin_profile_path
envoyAdminProfilePath.description:
Path to which Envoy writes pprof profiles when requested via the
 admin interface.

envoyAdminAddress.title: envoy_admin_address
envoyAdminAddress.description:
Address (host:port) on which Envoy exposes its admin interface.
 Empty disables the admin interface.

envoyBindConfigSourceAddress.title: envoy_bind_config_source_address
envoyBindConfigSourceAddress.description: Source address Envoy binds when connecting to upstreams.

envoyBindConfigFreebind.title: envoy_bind_config_freebind
envoyBindConfigFreebind.description:
When true, Envoy's upstream connections set IP_FREEBIND, allowing
 binding to non-local addresses.

programmaticRedirectDomainWhitelist.title: programmatic_redirect_domain_whitelist
programmaticRedirectDomainWhitelist.description: Hostnames Pomerium allows in programmatic-login redirect URLs.

oneOf.title: CodecType
oneOf.description: CodecType defines the codec type to use for connections.

codecType.title: codec_type
codecType.description: Default HTTP codec used for downstream connections.

primaryColor.title: primary_color
primaryColor.description:
Primary brand color (hex string like "#1e88e5") used in the
 Pomerium-served sign-in and error pages.

darkmodePrimaryColor.title: darkmode_primary_color
darkmodePrimaryColor.description: Primary brand color used in dark mode.

darkmodeSecondaryColor.title: darkmode_secondary_color
darkmodeSecondaryColor.description: Secondary brand color used in dark mode.

logoUrl.title: logo_url
logoUrl.description: URL of the logo image displayed on Pomerium-served pages.

faviconUrl.title: favicon_url
faviconUrl.description: URL of the favicon used on Pomerium-served pages.

errorMessageFirstParagraph.title: error_message_first_paragraph
errorMessageFirstParagraph.description:
First paragraph of the error message Pomerium shows on access denied
 pages, before the auto-generated diagnostic text.

passIdentityHeaders.title: pass_identity_headers
passIdentityHeaders.description:
When true, Pomerium adds X-Pomerium-* identity headers to upstream
 requests in addition to the signed JWT.

runtimeFlags.title: runtime_flags
runtimeFlags.description:
Per-flag boolean overrides for Pomerium runtime feature gates. The
 set of supported keys evolves with the release.

http3AdvertisePort.title: http3_advertise_port
http3AdvertisePort.description:
Port advertised in the Alt-Svc header so clients can upgrade to HTTP/3
 (QUIC). Zero disables advertisement.

maxConnections.title: max_connections
maxConnections.description:
The maximum number of connections that Envoy will make to the upstream
 cluster. If not specified, the default is 1024.

maxPendingRequests.title: max_pending_requests
maxPendingRequests.description:
The maximum number of pending requests that Envoy will allow to the
 upstream cluster. If not specified, the default is 1024. This limit is
 applied as a connection limit for non-HTTP traffic.

maxRequests.title: max_requests
maxRequests.description:
The maximum number of parallel requests that Envoy will make to the
 upstream cluster. If not specified, the default is 1024. This limit does
 not apply to non-HTTP traffic.

maxRetries.title: max_retries
maxRetries.description:
The maximum number of parallel retries that Envoy will allow to the
 upstream cluster. If not specified, the default is 3.

maxConnectionPools.title: max_connection_pools
maxConnectionPools.description:
The maximum number of connection pools per cluster that Envoy will
 concurrently support at once. If not specified, the default is unlimited.
 Set this for clusters which create a large number of connection pools.

oneOf.title: CircuitBreakerThresholds
oneOf.description: CircuitBreakerThresholds defines CircuitBreaker settings.

circuitBreakerThresholds.title: circuit_breaker_thresholds
circuitBreakerThresholds.description:
Default upstream circuit-breaker thresholds applied to all routes
 unless overridden per route.

sshAddress.title: ssh_address
sshAddress.description:
Address (host:port) on which Pomerium listens for SSH traffic.
 Empty disables the SSH proxy.

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

oneOf.title: StringList
oneOf.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

sshHostKeyFiles.title: ssh_host_key_files
sshHostKeyFiles.description:
Paths to host-key files Pomerium reads at startup to authenticate
 itself to SSH clients.

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

oneOf.title: StringList
oneOf.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

sshHostKeys.title: ssh_host_keys
sshHostKeys.description: Inline SSH host keys, used in place of `ssh_host_key_files`.

sshHostKeyPairIds.title: ssh_host_key_pair_ids
sshHostKeyPairIds.description:
IDs of managed key pairs to use as SSH host keys, as an alternative
 to file or inline values.

sshUserCaKeyFile.title: ssh_user_ca_key_file
sshUserCaKeyFile.description:
Path to a file containing the SSH user-CA private key Pomerium uses
 to issue short-lived SSH user certificates.

sshUserCaKey.title: ssh_user_ca_key
sshUserCaKey.description:
Inline SSH user-CA private key, used in place of
 `ssh_user_ca_key_file`.

sshUserCaKeyPairId.title: ssh_user_ca_key_pair_id
sshUserCaKeyPairId.description:
ID of a managed key pair to use as the SSH user-CA key, as an
 alternative to file or inline values.

mcpAllowedClientIdDomains.title: mcp_allowed_client_id_domains
mcpAllowedClientIdDomains.description:
mcp_allowed_client_id_domains specifies the allowed domains for MCP client ID metadata URLs.
 Supports wildcard patterns like "*.example.com".
 This is REQUIRED when MCP is enabled - client metadata fetching will fail if empty.

mcpAllowedAsMetadataDomains.title: mcp_allowed_as_metadata_domains
mcpAllowedAsMetadataDomains.description:
mcp_allowed_as_metadata_domains specifies the allowed domains for upstream AS/PRM metadata URLs.
 Supports wildcard patterns like "*.example.com".
 This restricts which domains Pomerium will contact during upstream OAuth discovery.

directoryProvider.title: directory_provider
directoryProvider.description:
Directory-sync provider Pomerium uses to enumerate users and groups
 ("auth0", "okta", "azure", …). Empty disables directory sync.

additionalProperties.description:
Represents a JSON value.

 `Value` represents a dynamically typed value which can be either
 null, a number, a string, a boolean, a recursive struct value, or a
 list of values. A producer of value is expected to set one of these
 variants. Absence of any variant is an invalid state.
additionalProperties.title: google.protobuf.Value

oneOf.description:
Represents a JSON object.

 An unordered key-value map, intending to perfectly capture the semantics of a
 JSON object. This enables parsing any arbitrary JSON payload as a message
 field in ProtoJSON format.

 This follows RFC 8259 guidelines for interoperable JSON: notably this type
 cannot represent large Int64 values or `NaN`/`Infinity` numbers,
 since the JSON format generally does not support those values in its number
 type.

 If you do not intend to parse arbitrary JSON into your message, a custom
 typed message should be preferred instead of using this type.
oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Struct

directoryProviderOptions.title: directory_provider_options
directoryProviderOptions.description:
Provider-specific options for the directory provider, as a generic
 JSON object.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

directoryProviderRefreshInterval.title: directory_provider_refresh_interval
directoryProviderRefreshInterval.description: How often Pomerium refreshes the directory cache.

oneOf.title: google.protobuf.Duration

directoryProviderRefreshTimeout.title: directory_provider_refresh_timeout
directoryProviderRefreshTimeout.description: Per-attempt timeout for a single directory refresh cycle.

bucketUri.title: bucket_uri
bucketUri.description:
URI of the object-storage bucket (e.g. "s3://my-bucket",
 "gs://my-bucket"). Empty disables blob storage.

managedPrefix.title: managed_prefix
managedPrefix.description:
Optional path prefix within the bucket where Pomerium stores managed
 objects, isolating them from other tenants of the same bucket.

oneOf.title: BlobStorageSettings
oneOf.description:
BlobStorageSettings configures the object-storage backend Pomerium uses
 for large artifacts such as session recordings.

blobStorage.title: blob_storage
blobStorage.description:
Object-storage backend Pomerium uses for large artifacts (session
 recordings, exports). Empty disables blob storage.

autoApplyChangesets.title: auto_apply_changesets
autoApplyChangesets.description:
auto_apply_changesets controls whether or not changesets are automatically
 applied or require an adminstrator to apply them. This setting is
 currently only used in Pomerium Zero.

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

oneOf.title: StringList
oneOf.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

allowUpgrades.title: allow_upgrades
allowUpgrades.description: Allows HTTP upgrade requests to be forwarded upstream.

values.title: values
values.description: The string values held by this list.

envoyDynamicExtensions.title: StringList
envoyDynamicExtensions.description:
Wrapper for a list of strings, used so map-valued Settings fields can
 hold repeated string values.

sessionRecordingConcurrency.title: session_recording_concurrency
sessionRecordingConcurrency.description:
Tunes the maximum number of worker threads that envoy allocates for session recording
 uploading

normalizePath.title: normalize_path
normalizePath.description:
Should paths be normalized according to RFC 3986 before any processing of
 requests by HTTP filters or routing? Defaults to true.

mergeSlashes.title: merge_slashes
mergeSlashes.description:
Determines if adjacent slashes in the path are merged into one before any
 processing of requests by HTTP filters or routing. Defaults to true.

oneOf.title: PathWithEscapedSlashesAction
oneOf.description:
PathWithEscapedSlashesAction determines the action for request that contain
 %2F, %2f, %5C or %5c sequences in the URI path.

pathWithEscapedSlashesAction.title: path_with_escaped_slashes_action
pathWithEscapedSlashesAction.description:
Action to take when request URL path contains escaped slash sequences
 (%2F, %2f, %5C and %5c). Defaults to rejecting requests.

oneOf.title: HeadersWithUnderscoresAction
oneOf.description: Action to take when Envoy receives client request with header names containing underscore characters.

headersWithUnderscoresAction.title: headers_with_underscores_action
headersWithUnderscoresAction.description:
Action to take when a client request with a header name containing
 underscore characters is received. Defaults to rejecting the request.

createdAt.title: google.protobuf.Timestamp

modifiedAt.title: google.protobuf.Timestamp

settings.title: settings
settings.description: Page of Settings records matching the request.

totalCount.title: total_count
totalCount.description: Total number of Settings records matching the request across all pages.

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

message.description: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the [google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

type.description: A URL that acts as a globally unique identifier for the type of the serialized message. For example: `type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.ErrorInfo`. This is used to determine the schema of the data in the `value` field and is the discriminator for the `debug` field.

value.description: The Protobuf message, serialized as bytes and base64-encoded. The specific message type is identified by the `type` field.

oneOf.title: Any
oneOf.description: Detailed error information.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Deserialized error detail payload. The 'type' field indicates the schema. This field is for easier debugging and should not be relied upon for application logic.

items.description: Contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a @type that describes the type of the serialized message, with an additional debug field for ConnectRPC error details.
items.title: connect.error_details.Any

details.description: A list of messages that carry the error details. There is no limit on the number of messages.
